mentions.note: Perno-Ricard merger catalyst; stock down 73% from 2020 peak, trading <16x earnings; showing operational inflection—three straight revenue beats, positive sales growth after eight quarters of declines; RTD segment (ready-to-drink) growing 8%, Jack Daniels mix performing exceptionally well. Negatives priced in; genuine improvement emerging.
